data.content: Shipment review APPROVED. Verified both commits on main: ddbde9dda1cb (scrollbar-gutter: stable in globals.css) and 1ad707b8a930 (constrain retake row title width in retake-row-parts.tsx). CI green on main (32fd3e5f). Quality gates pass: lint 0 errors, typecheck clean, 2365/2365 tests pass. Commit tags already present on knot. No invariants defined. No regressions detected.
